languages.text: "Отец". {n}Ювенна делает шаг вперед и пристально смотрит на Себериана.{/n} "Прошу, доверься мне хотя бы единожды. Наш враг силен и яростен, но разумен. Я хороша в дипломатическом искусстве — позволь мне отправиться к Диодасу аф Иррамону и заключить с ним соглашение от твоего имени. От этого династия лишь окрепнет. Если же ничего не выйдет... пусть мельта-пушки и лазганы говорят вместо меня".
languages.translation_comment:
Спикер: Ювенна
НЕ играет DL_JuvennaArrestedOrDead
выдаем Obj2_Cl_Conspiracy и Obj1_Cl_JuvennaVoice и Obj2_RenegadesVotes

languages.text: "Father." {n}Juvenna takes a step forward and stares intently at Seberian.{/n} "Please trust me, just this once. Our enemy is strong and formidable, but reasonable. I am skilled in diplomacy — let me go to Diodas af Irramon and treat with him on your behalf. It will only make the dynasty stronger. If my way fails... then let the melta-guns and lasguns speak in my place."
languages.original_text: "Отец". {n}Ювенна делает шаг вперед и пристально смотрит на Себериана.{/n} "Прошу, доверься мне хотя бы единожды. Наш враг силен и яростен, но разумен. Я хороша в дипломатическом искусстве — позволь мне отправиться к Диодасу аф Иррамону и заключить с ним соглашение от твоего имени. От этого династия лишь окрепнет. Если же ничего не выйдет... пусть мельта-пушки и лазганы говорят вместо меня".

I am skilled in diplomacy — let me go to Diodas af Irramon and treat with him on your behalf. It will only make the dynasty stronger. If my way fails... then let the melta-guns and lasguns speak in my place."

languages.text: “父亲。”{n}尤文娜上前一步，目光紧紧锁定塞贝里安。{/n}“请相信我，就这一次。我们的敌人强大而危险，但并非不可理喻。我精通外交——让我去见见狄奥达斯·阿夫·伊拉蒙，代表您与他谈判吧。这只会让王朝更加强大。如果失败……那就让热熔枪和激光枪替我发声吧。”
languages.original_text: "Father." {n}Juvenna takes a step forward and stares intently at Seberian.{/n} "Please trust me, just this once. Our enemy is strong and formidable, but reasonable. I am skilled in diplomacy — let me go to Diodas af Irramon and treat with him on your behalf. It will only make the dynasty stronger. If my way fails... then let the melta-guns and lasguns speak in my place."

traits.locale_text: “父亲。”{n}尤文娜上前一步，目光紧紧锁定塞贝里安。{/n}“请相信我，就这一次。我们的敌人强大而危险，但并非不可理喻。我精通外交——让我去见见狄奥达斯·阿夫·伊拉蒙，代表您与他谈判吧。这只会让王朝更加强大。如果失败……那就让热熔枪和激光枪替我发声吧。”

languages.text: « Père. {n}Juvenna s'avance avec un regard appuyé en direction de Seberian.{/n} Je vous en supplie, faites-moi confiance, ne serait-ce qu'une fois. L'ennemi est fort et remarquable, mais raisonnable. J'ai des talents de diplomate ; laissez-moi m'entretenir avec Diodas af Irramon en votre nom. Ça ne fera que renforcer la dynastie. Et si j'échoue... vous pourrez laisser les armes à fusion et les fusils laser s'exprimer à ma place. »
languages.original_text: "Father." {n}Juvenna takes a step forward and stares intently at Seberian.{/n} "Please trust me, just this once. Our enemy is strong and formidable, but reasonable. I am skilled in diplomacy — let me go to Diodas af Irramon and treat with him on your behalf. It will only make the dynasty stronger. If my way fails... then let the melta-guns and lasguns speak in my place."

traits.locale_text: « Père. {n}Juvenna s'avance avec un regard appuyé en direction de Seberian.{/n} Je vous en supplie, faites-moi confiance, ne serait-ce qu'une fois. L'ennemi est fort et remarquable, mais raisonnable. J'ai des talents de diplomate ; laissez-moi m'entretenir avec Diodas af Irramon en votre nom. Ça ne fera que renforcer la dynastie. Et si j'échoue... vous pourrez laisser les armes à fusion et les fusils laser s'exprimer à ma place. »

languages.text: «Padre». {n}Juvenna da un paso al frente y mira fijamente a Seberian.{/n} «Confía en mí, aunque sea solo por esta vez. Nuestro enemigo es poderoso, formidable incluso, pero también es razonable. Permite que vaya a Diodas af Irramon y negocie en tu nombre. Solo servirá para que la dinastía sea más fuerte. Y, si fracaso... entonces los rifles láser y de fusión podrán hablar en mi lugar».
languages.original_text: "Father." {n}Juvenna takes a step forward and stares intently at Seberian.{/n} "Please trust me, just this once. Our enemy is strong and formidable, but reasonable. I am skilled in diplomacy — let me go to Diodas af Irramon and treat with him on your behalf. It will only make the dynasty stronger. If my way fails... then let the melta-guns and lasguns speak in my place."

traits.locale_text: «Padre». {n}Juvenna da un paso al frente y mira fijamente a Seberian.{/n} «Confía en mí, aunque sea solo por esta vez. Nuestro enemigo es poderoso, formidable incluso, pero también es razonable. Permite que vaya a Diodas af Irramon y negocie en tu nombre. Solo servirá para que la dinastía sea más fuerte. Y, si fracaso... entonces los rifles láser y de fusión podrán hablar en mi lugar».

languages.text: "Baba." {n}Juvenna, bir adım öne çıkıp Seberian'a dikkatle bakıyor.{/n} "Lütfen bana güven, sadece bu seferlik. Düşmanımız güçlü ve zorlu ama makul. Ben diplomaside yetenekliyim... Bırakın Diodas af İrramon'a gideyim ve onunla sizin adınıza görüşeyim. Bu sadece hanedanlığı güçlendirecektir. Eğer yöntemim başarısız olursa... O zaman melta silahları ve silazerler benim yerime konuşur."
languages.original_text: "Father." {n}Juvenna takes a step forward and stares intently at Seberian.{/n} "Please trust me, just this once. Our enemy is strong and formidable, but reasonable. I am skilled in diplomacy — let me go to Diodas af Irramon and treat with him on your behalf. It will only make the dynasty stronger. If my way fails... then let the melta-guns and lasguns speak in my place."

traits.locale_text: "Baba." {n}Juvenna, bir adım öne çıkıp Seberian'a dikkatle bakıyor.{/n} "Lütfen bana güven, sadece bu seferlik. Düşmanımız güçlü ve zorlu ama makul. Ben diplomaside yetenekliyim... Bırakın Diodas af İrramon'a gideyim ve onunla sizin adınıza görüşeyim. Bu sadece hanedanlığı güçlendirecektir. Eğer yöntemim başarısız olursa... O zaman melta silahları ve silazerler benim yerime konuşur."

languages.text: "Vater." {n}Juvenna tritt vor und blick Seberian durchdringend an.{/n} "Bitte vertraut mir. Nur dieses eine Mal. Unser Feind ist stark und Respekt einflößend, aber auch vernünftig. Ich bin eine geschickte Diplomatin ... lasst mich in Eurem Namen mit Diodas af Irramon verhandeln. Das würde die Dynastie stärken. Sollte ich scheitern ... mögen die Meltergeschütze und Lasergewehre an meiner Stelle sprechen."
languages.original_text: "Father." {n}Juvenna takes a step forward and stares intently at Seberian.{/n} "Please trust me, just this once. Our enemy is strong and formidable, but reasonable. I am skilled in diplomacy — let me go to Diodas af Irramon and treat with him on your behalf. It will only make the dynasty stronger. If my way fails... then let the melta-guns and lasguns speak in my place."

traits.locale_text: "Vater." {n}Juvenna tritt vor und blick Seberian durchdringend an.{/n} "Bitte vertraut mir. Nur dieses eine Mal. Unser Feind ist stark und Respekt einflößend, aber auch vernünftig. Ich bin eine geschickte Diplomatin ... lasst mich in Eurem Namen mit Diodas af Irramon verhandeln. Das würde die Dynastie stärken. Sollte ich scheitern ... mögen die Meltergeschütze und Lasergewehre an meiner Stelle sprechen."

languages.text: 「父上」{n}ユベナは一歩前に出て、シベリアンの顔を見つめた。{/n}「どうか、一度だけ私に任せてください。敵は強大で恐ろしいですが、理にかなっています。私は外交に長けています。ディオダス・ア・イルラモンに赴き、父上に代わって交渉いたします。このことが、王朝をより強くするでしょう。もし私の方法が失敗したら…ならば、溶断銃とレーザー銃が代わりに語ります。」
languages.original_text: "Father." {n}Juvenna takes a step forward and stares intently at Seberian.{/n} "Please trust me, just this once. Our enemy is strong and formidable, but reasonable. I am skilled in diplomacy — let me go to Diodas af Irramon and treat with him on your behalf. It will only make the dynasty stronger. If my way fails... then let the melta-guns and lasguns speak in my place."
